reviews.text: Have used several plumbers in the past, with varying success. Some were expensive, some were unreliable - it was always hit and miss. Thought I'd give Greens Precise Plumbing a shot as I needed a new toilet and hand basin plumbed in. Callum was great, he explained the requirements for the job, provided an excellent quote and crucially delivered on the agreed costs and timescale. Highly recommended for being reliable, honest and professional - they even cleaned up after themselves!! Great job Callum and Greens Precise Plumbing 👍

First Class service from the Greens Plumbing team. Responsive service, easy to book and kept me updated re time of arrival so I didn’t have to wait in all day. I had a toilet that didn’t flush and a leak in the kitchen tap both dealt with very well and efficiently. The quote was spot on. I have already booked them in for a new boiler. Would definitely recommend as they could teach some other companies the meaning of Customer Service.

Called greens precise plumbing and heating in the morning after I had a leak in my flush and didn't think I would be seen to at least the next days but the guys came over a couple hours later and sorted the issue out. Payment over invoice was also a breeze. Couldn't have had a better experience! Highly recommend them

Excellent service from start to finish. Quick and easy quote emailed, turned up when the work was agreed to be started. Really nice shower enclosure installed and also fixed my toilet which wasn’t originally planned. Lovely, polite and professional boys did the job. The price I was very happy with too.

Callum and his team arrived on time, did a great job fitting 4 radiators, 2 of which were very tricky. Finished in super quick time and tidied up after themselves. Very impressed and definitely will use his services again.
